# ProductOS - AI-Native Product Development Platform
# https://www.productos.dev
# Last updated: February 2026

## About ProductOS
ProductOS is an AI-native product development platform that helps founders and product teams ship products 10x faster. Built by 1Labs AI, it provides 5 specialized AI agents that cover the complete product development lifecycle from ideation to deployment.

## The Problem We Solve
Building products traditionally requires a large team: product managers, researchers, designers, and developers. Solo founders and small teams struggle to compete. ProductOS democratizes product development by providing AI agents that act as your complete product team.

## Core Features - 5 AI Agents

### 1. Ideation Agent
- AI-powered brainstorming and concept generation
- Problem-solution-audience concept cards
- Rapid positioning and angle exploration
- Value proposition crafting
- Output: Ideation brief with validated concepts

### 2. Discovery Agent  
- Automated market research
- Competitor analysis and gap identification
- Trend detection and opportunity mapping
- User insight synthesis
- Output: Research report with actionable insights

### 3. Define Agent
- PRD (Product Requirements Document) generation
- User story creation with acceptance criteria
- Technical specification writing
- Roadmap and milestone planning
- Output: Complete PRD with 20+ user stories

### 4. Design Agent
- Wireframe and mockup generation
- UI component design
- Design system creation
- Responsive layout generation
- Figma export (Pro/Enterprise)
- Output: Production-ready UI designs

### 5. Develop Agent
- Clean React/Next.js code generation
- API endpoint scaffolding
- Test suite creation
- GitHub integration
- One-click deployment to Vercel
- Output: Deployable codebase

## What Makes ProductOS Different
1. **Context Preservation**: Each agent builds on the previous. Research flows into PRD, PRD flows into design, design flows into code. Nothing gets lost.
2. **AI-Native Architecture**: Not AI bolted onto existing tools. Built from the ground up for AI-first workflows.
3. **End-to-End Platform**: From idea to deployed product in one platform. No tool-switching.
4. **Human in the Loop**: AI assists, you decide. Review and refine at every stage.

## Pricing
- **Free**: $0/month - 1 project, 5 generations/day, basic AI agents
- **Pro**: $49/month - Unlimited projects, all AI agents, GitHub integration, Figma sync
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing - Team features, SSO, dedicated support, SLA

## Statistics
- 10,000+ founders served
- 50,000+ products built
- 1M+ AI generations
- Average MVP time: 8 days (vs 90 days traditional)
- 70% reduction in documentation time
- 4.9/5 user rating

## Use Cases
1. **Solo Founders**: Build your MVP without a team
2. **Startup Teams**: Ship features 10x faster
3. **Product Managers**: Automate documentation and specs
4. **Agencies**: Deliver client projects faster
5. **Enterprise**: Standardize product development workflows

## Integrations
- GitHub (export code, PRs)
- Figma (design sync)
- Vercel (one-click deploy)
- Linear (coming soon)
- Slack (coming soon)
